main_page.open_file_button: Open or add new file(s) for denoising
main_page.load_example_button: Load an example image to try Aydin
main_page.images_button: Preview loaded images and select which ones to denoise
main_page.dimensions_button: Specify how to interpret image dimensions (batch, channel, spatial)
main_page.training_crop_button: Crop images for training the denoising model
main_page.denoise_button: Choose the denoising algorithm and its settings
main_page.start_button: Start the denoising process with current settings
main_page.napari_button: Open napari to view input and denoised images side by side
main_page.activity_button: Show or hide the activity log panel

backend_options: This regressor might take longer time but can bring better image quality with results.
This regressor will use CPU resources strictly.
Fast but overall poor performance -- as expected.
Uses standard perceptron-like neural networks. Uses PyTorch to implement neural networks.
Way too slow when non-linear. When using linear much faster, but does not perform better than straight linear regression.

deconvolve.method_label_combobox: Choose the deconvolution method you want to use
deconvolve.backend_combobox: Choose the computational backend you want to run on
